history.text: What is the latest OpenAI API pricing?

OpenAI's pricing for its API models, such as GPT-4o and GPT-3.5 Turbo, varies based on token counts and model versions, and is subject to change without notice. As of late 2024, GPT-4o typically costs around $5 per 1 million input tokens and $15 per 1 million output tokens, while GPT-3.5 Turbo is significantly cheaper, often under $0.50 per 1 million input tokens. For the most accurate and up-to-date rates, including any new model releases or adjustments, you should check the official OpenAI website or contact their sales team, as these figures can fluctuate.
